text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japan Cup. Meisho Doto
nervously announces herself as a rival to T.M.
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O puts on a shocked front, but she
inwardly welcomes the change and gladly accepts
Doto's challenge.
